use_cases: Primary action triggers for forms, dialogs, and call-to-action scenarios
Destructive action buttons for delete, remove, or cancel confirmations
Outline-style secondary buttons for less prominent user actions
Ghost buttons for minimal UI contexts requiring subtle interaction affordances
Link-style buttons for inline navigation within content areas
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-style atomic button component with CVA-powered variant system supporting 6 visual styles (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes. Built on Radix UI Slot for flexible composition, with Tailwind shadow utilities and focus-visible keyboard navigation states. Designed for design system integration with accessible focus ring patterns and smooth hover transitions.
